_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing endpoint collection data.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis, correlation analysis, anomaly detection, and translating EDA findings into modeling decisions.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.538), DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.534).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.518). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, collection, endpoint] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, anomaly, conducting, correlation, decisions, detection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.933, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in analyzing endpoint collection data." and "Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 ≈ STS 0.518 (gap 0.020). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, collection, endpoint]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, anomaly, conducting, correlation, decisions, detection].
